exampleSentencesTranslated: This weekend, I will play basketball with my friends.
She has learned to play basketball since she was a child.
I like to watch basketball games on television in the evening.
notes:
Bóng rổ means basketball — the sport with two hoops and a ball.

It’s a noun. You usually say chơi bóng rổ (to play basketball), sân bóng rổ (basketball court), đội bóng rổ (basketball team).  
When talking about the physical ball, say quả bóng rổ (quả = classifier for round objects).  
It refers to the sport in general; for one game or match, you can say trận bóng rổ (a basketball match).
notes_md:
**Bóng rổ** means *basketball* — the sport with two hoops and a ball.

It’s a noun. You usually say **chơi bóng rổ** (to play basketball), **sân bóng rổ** (basketball court), **đội bóng rổ** (basketball team).  
When talking about the physical ball, say **quả bóng rổ** (quả = classifier for round objects).  
It refers to the sport in general; for one game or match, you can say **trận bóng rổ** (a basketball match).
exampleSentences: Cuối tuần này, anh sẽ đi chơi bóng rổ với bạn bè.
Chị ấy học cách chơi bóng rổ từ khi còn nhỏ.
Em thích xem các trận bóng rổ trên truyền hình vào buổi tối.

definitions.vi: Môn thể thao thi đấu giữa hai đội, mục tiêu là ném bóng vào rổ của đối phương.
definitions.en: Basketball; a game played between two teams of five players in which goals are scored by throwing a ball through a netted hoop.

example.vi: Anh ấy ném bóng rổ rất chính xác.
example.en: He throws the basketball very accurately.
example.es: Él lanza el balón de baloncesto muy con precisión.

content.sentence: Cuối tuần này, anh sẽ đi chơi ___ với bạn bè.

translation.en: This weekend, I will go play basketball with my friends.

content.sentence: Chị ấy học cách chơi ___ từ khi còn nhỏ.

translation.en: She learned how to play basketball since she was a child.
